Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class PromptAction

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.PromptAction
public class PromptAction extends SObject

Java class for PromptAction complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="PromptAction">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastDisplayDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastResult" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastResultDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Owner" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OwnerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessInstances" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessSteps" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PromptVersion" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}PromptVersion" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PromptVersionId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Shares" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SnoozeUntil" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StepCount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StepNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TimesActionTaken" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TimesDismissed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TimesDisplayed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TimesSnoozed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="User" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
